evals.prompt: Initialize a paper-orchestra desk for my new research project on video segmentation. I want to use the CVPR 2025 template.
evals.expected_output: A properly scaffolded desk directory with all required input files (idea.md, log.md, tmpl.md, gl.md) and subdirectories
expectations: The desk/inputs/idea.md file exists with template content
The desk/inputs/log.md file exists with template content

evals.prompt: Validate my paper-orchestra desk at evals/files/sample-desk/ and tell me what's missing or wrong.
evals.expected_output: A validation report identifying any missing or invalid input files
expectations: The validation output identifies which required files are present
The validation output identifies which required files are missing or invalid

evals.prompt: Generate an outline from my idea.md and log.md files in evals/files/complete-desk/. Just do Step 1 of the pipeline.
evals.expected_output: A valid ol.json file with plotting_plan, intro_related_work_plan, and section_plan
expectations: Each plotting_plan entry has figure_id, plot_type, data_source, aspect_ratio
Citation hints are provided for datasets and baselines mentioned in log.md

evals.prompt: Check the manuscript at evals/files/sample-manuscript.tex for anti-leakage violations.
evals.expected_output: A report of any author-identifying information found in the manuscript
expectations: Email addresses are flagged if present
Author declarations are flagged if present
Affiliation patterns are flagged if present
